violations.text: Sliced deli meat, cheese, and prepared salads were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/18/2026

Food items - prepared meals, desserts, and salads packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 02/18/2026
Food items were observed stored on the floor. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/18/2026

Knifes stored on an unclean surface (between prep unit) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/18/2026

ROP snow crab meat was observed thawing with ROP packaging intact. Establishment is to remove ROP seafood from package when thawing. Snow crab was observed at 41 DF and was voluntarily disposed of at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/11/2024

Various foods packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Establishment is to add labels to any food packaged in the food establishment. New Violation. Correct By: 12/11/2024

Bags of ice were observed stored on the floor in the walk-in freezer. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Ice was moved at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/11/2024
The hood system was observed with an accumulation of debris. Hood system must be maintained. New Violation. Correct By: 12/25/2024
